endpoints.name: GET /lottery/countries
endpoints.description: Get the complete list of countries supported in the number generation API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /lottery/draw
endpoints.description: Generate random draw for a given lottery game.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /lottery/supported
endpoints.description: Get the list of supported lottery games supported in the given country.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.
